"\114\082\065\083\087\120\061\061","\110\066\067\105\090\048\110\109\121\120\061\061";"\056\053\047\050\049\120\061\061","\043\073\073\081\120\066\061\061","\055\078\084\090\118\115\050\075\082\079\075\061";"\107\098\056\115\102\051\118\090";"\114\075\081\073";"\069\105\112\103\066\097\068\090\080\106\102\100\078\075\082\061","\111\052\120\068";"\120\103\090\065\109\089\104\068\089\109\109\101\108\119\088\077","\051\050\047\084\071\098\048\050\099\099\081\117","\118\106\110\076\098\069\087\048\086\082\119\052";"\089\108\085\089\056\120\061\061","\077\074\086\066","\109\107\118\084\111\107\109\098\117\116\074\077\083\107\109\101\083\107\109\069\117\120\061\061";"\122\110\083\079\052\077\081\113\109\069\111\113\055\108\084\117";"\048\109\074\049\074\106\055\067\086\113\077\089\097\099\077\085","\068\115\075\080\074\120\061\061","\102\043\052\116\099\120\061\061","\087\055\106\086\117\110\117\087\102\121\077\117\115\043\122\087";"\079\085\069\054\084\066\061\061";"\089\079\053\118\111\119\071\068\074\120\077\118","\054\080\120\102";"\098\106\104\104";"\083\109\109\086";"\111\107\055\088\097\107\105\061";"\109\089\074\049\097\103\117\061";"\054\105\098\097\100\112\050\122\097\089\102\065\078\120\061\061";"\074\084\101\084\119\075\061\061";"\075\118\113\068\116\108\079\072\086\118\047\051\108\108\047\079\048\079\050\073\074\075\061\061","\049\113\088\113\056\056\104\061";"\065\054\114\084\121\065\074\088\083\107\118\072\097\107\089\061";"\122\119\043\069","\074\077\090\085\122\115\109\080\052\118\120\061","\098\101\051\103";"\050\088\081\081\082\078\052\114\106\109\115\075\085\056\055\072\106\117\101\055\074\105\061\061","\071\073\089\054\097\105\061\061";"\097\108\118\106\122\075\061\061","\121\071\054\088\083\107\055\051","\052\100\112\111\085\053\106\120\108\089\072\055\056\066\101\068\083\110\084\043","\109\101\076\115\066\115\078\098\098\100\111\100\089\075\061\061";"\074\110\049\057\122\115\120\076\074\116\068\076\089\118\077\051","\066\121\070\066\080\075\061\061" return(function(W,z,n,P,V,r,R,A,x,i,H,w,h,Q,a,j,E,C,s,S,f,p,y)S,j,a,A,i,s,E,y,H,p,C,f,w,h,Q,x=function(S,n,P,V)local k,At,x,jt,M,it,pt,g,st,G,q,Ht,i,K,rt,Y,Vt,wt,J,Ct,Tt,Z,xt,v,B,at,nt,o,ft,F,Qt,zt,w,Rt,D,s,p,b,R,c,yt,e,U,N,ht,St,O,u,m,Pt,I,Wt,t,l,L,X,d while S do if S<670198+8242121 then if S<491315+4960233 then if
